headline: Adolescent Mental Health Services Absent in 78% of Districts
context: Child and adolescent mental health services are available in only 34 of 154 health districts nationwide.

cards.big: 78% of health districts have no dedicated adolescent mental health services in 2025
cards.sub: Teenagers in underserved districts must travel to state capitals for psychiatric care

cards.big: Malaysia has only 52 child and adolescent psychiatrists for 9.2 million under-18 population
cards.sub: Ratio of 1 specialist per 177,000 youth is critically below international benchmarks

cards.big: Self-harm among 13-17 year olds increased 58% between 2022 and 2025 per MOH data
cards.sub: Rising adolescent distress without accessible services creates growing crisis

cards.big: Ireland established 72 community youth mental health teams serving every county since 2020
cards.sub: Decentralized specialist teams bring services to adolescents rather than requiring travel

cards.big: Telling struggling teenagers to travel 200km for help is the same as telling them to manage alone
Should every health district have at least one child and adolescent mental health team
